content:
# Session 43 — review summary

## NO PROVER LANE — terminal closeout (7th consecutive, correct call)

- `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{type: summary, no_prover_lane: true, iter: 43}`. `prover.jsonl` empty.
- `sync_leanok-state.json`: iter=43, sha=`91edf97`, +0/−0, `chapters_touched: []`.
- `git log`: single extraction commit `c53d9c9`; `git diff --stat HEAD` empty — no `.lean` edit since
  iter-036; no regression possible.

## Verified independently
- `grep -rln sorry AlgebraicJacobian/`: only `Picard/QuotScheme.lean` (4 typed χ skeletons L126/165/201/228)
  + `Picard/RelativeSpec.lean` hold typed sorries — both out-of-leg. `SectionGradedRing.lean:3880` is the
  sole SGR grep hit and is a COMMENT ("…no proof exists without `sorryAx`"), not a typed sorry — file is
  sorry-free.
- No closable in-cone sorry exists. Plan's no-dispatch decision re-weighed and is sound: re-probe χ
  (cohomology/Snapper-gated), open cohomology megaleg (overreach; critic-validated H⁰ scope, not USER-opened),
  split done file (busywork; split directive targets files with UNPROVED theorems), name/repoint anonymous
  pins (net-negative; manufactures merge conflicts) — all correctly declined.

## Leg state — DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
`Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1–B7 assoc + ∀L `GSemiring` + invertible-L
`GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. `SectionGradedRing.lean` SORRY-FREE. No live frontier.

## Blueprint doctor (iter-043) — out-of-cone, do NOT edit
`logs/iter-043/blueprint-doctor.md` reports only dormant inherited chapters:
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` — 2 phantom covers (non-existent `FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean`) + 13
  broken `\ref`.
- `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` — 4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`.
- `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` — 13 broken `\cref`.
No prover dispatched near them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Merge-time per Archon memory.

## Coverage debt
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls (single-commit extraction).
Merge-time; not this leg's debt.

## Subagent skips
- lean-auditor: no `.lean` file modified this iter (no prover lane, `git diff --stat HEAD` empty); prior
  verdict (iter-036) had no live must-fix. Both skip conditions met.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker: no `.lean` files received prover work this iter (no edits to verify).
